role: Directory containing GitHub issue templates for bug reports, feature requests, and documentation improvements.
responsibility: Collectively, these templates standardize contributions by defining required fields for each type of issue, ensuring consistency and completeness in submissions.

children.role: This document provides a structured template for reporting bugs in the ArchSpine project, ensuring consistency and completeness in bug submissions.
Issue template for suggesting documentation improvements
Feature request template for proposing new capabilities or workflow improvements.
